allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; pkg=json.load\(sys.stdin\); exports=pkg.get\('exports',{}\); [print\(k,'=>',v if isinstance\(v,str\) else v.get\('types','?'\)\) for k,v in exports.items\(\) if 'token' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/@clerk/expo/package.json'\); const exports = pkg.exports || {}; Object.entries\(exports\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => { if \(k.includes\('token'\)\) console.log\(k, '->', typeof v === 'string' ? v : JSON.stringify\(v\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/@clerk/expo/package.json'\); const exports = pkg.exports || {}; Object.entries\(exports\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => { if \(!k.includes\('native'\) && !k.includes\('apple'\) && !k.includes\('google'\)\) console.log\(k, '->', typeof v === 'string' ? v : JSON.stringify\(v\).substring\(0,80\)\); }\);")
